name: Wheezing
description: You sometimes struggle to catch your breath.

name: Chest tightness
description: Your chest feels tight, especially after physical activity.

name: Excessive thirst
description: You feel constantly thirsty and need to drink more than usual.

name: Unexplained fatigue
description: You feel tired and weak even after resting.

name: Persistent sadness
description: You feel down most of the time and struggle to find joy in things.

name: Loss of motivation
description: It's hard to get started on even simple tasks.

name: Difficulty focusing
description: Your mind wanders and it's hard to stay on task.

name: Restlessness
description: You feel the need to move or do something constantly.

name: Excessive worry
description: You find yourself worrying about many things, often without a clear reason.

name: Muscle tension
description: Your body feels tense and you have trouble relaxing.

name: Localized pain
description: You have significant pain and swelling in one area.

name: Unexplained weight loss
description: You're losing weight without trying and feel unusually tired.

name: Emotional exhaustion
description: You feel drained and unable to cope with daily demands.
